inputs.label: Perpetuity Type
inputs.businessContext: 0 for constant perpetuity, 1 for growing perpetuity

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for constant perpetuity, 1 for growing perpetuity
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabit süreklilik için 0, artan süreklilik için 1
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für konstante Ewigkeit, 1 für wachsende Ewigkeit
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 pour perpétuité constante, 1 pour perpétuité croissante
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 para perpetuidad constante, 1 para perpetuidad creciente

inputs.label: Periodic Payment
inputs.businessContext: The constant cash flow per period

businessContext_i18n.en: The constant cash flow per period
businessContext_i18n.fr: Flux de trésorerie constant par période
businessContext_i18n.es: El flujo de caja constante por período

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: The required rate of return per period

businessContext_i18n.en: The required rate of return per period
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement requis par période
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de rendimiento requerida por período

inputs.label: Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: The constant growth rate of the payment (only used for growing perpetuity)

businessContext_i18n.en: The constant growth rate of the payment (only used for growing perpetuity)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ödemenin sabit büyüme oranı (yalnızca artan süreklilik için kullanılır)
businessContext_i18n.de: Die konstante Wachstumsrate der Zahlung (nur für wachsende Ewigkeit)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de croissance constant du paiement (utilisé uniquement pour la perpétuité croissante)
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de crecimiento constante del pago (solo se usa para perpetuidad creciente)
